author: orionriver@gmail.com
text:
Coherence pass on the frozen architecture spec

Post-freeze adversarial read of docs/architecture.md. Fixes: §13 prime --install config-chain survival -> single-hop; §0/§4 landing 'sole authority' -> 'no remote is authoritative' (local stack landing+XDG+CLI); §11 de-privilege the delivery plugin (it prints its own worktree path on stdout, core forwards and computes nothing); §8 'every op is the same shape' -> two families (task ops symmetric; sync/prime/doctor inherit only the spine, sync's integration is the tracker's); §4 landing single-owner made structural; §6 install loud-deletions; §3/§9/§10/§17 blocker model generalized and de-conflated from containment (--parent containment-only, --blocks/--needs explicit, --gates retired). §15 revision log updated.
